  3. Rated 3 out of 5

    Meenakshi Sundaram Vivek (verified purchase) – April 25, 2026

    Sound, quality and noise cancellation works perfectly. Issue in the sensor touch in tws. When you took out of ear it will pause when you place in table it will play. Sensor sensitivity is too high tough to handle.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Meenakshi,

    We really apologize for the inconvenience caused by the sensor sensitivity. Please mail us at help.vyntech@gmail.com and we will assign a software support expert to help you recalibrate the in-ear detection sensors for a smoother experience.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  4. Rated 4 out of 5

    Durga Ram (verified purchase) – April 25, 2026

    The first look and feel of this tws is awesome, built quality looks premium, sound quality much better than expected, all features working fine.battery back up is ok, anc and transparency mode also working fine.overall a good value for money.

  5. Rated 3 out of 5

    Siddhartha Talukdar (verified purchase) – April 25, 2026

    Earbuds are really good. But the box have a battery drain issue. Else the product is good.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Siddhartha,

    We really apologize for the inconvenience caused. You need not worry, as mentioned in the replacement policy; you can easily initiate a replacement, and your brand new product will be delivered to you within the same period as the first delivery.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech

  6. Rated 4 out of 5

    Advait (verified purchase) – April 25, 2026

    Pros:
    1. It doesn't support Spatial Audio but it produces it very well while watching Netflix Spatial Audio support movies.
    2. The Sound is Loud
    3. Comfortable

    Cons:
    1. Touch sensors on earbuds are placed at wrong place. You touch to adjust the earbuds and sensor activates, which would accidentally play / paus music, movies etc.
    2. Noise cancellation ok ok .

    Sound quality is good for movies, music. The only issue is bad treble. Otherwise it has good soundstage
    The case is very heavy, not a con, but it's too heavy than other buds.

    Response from Vyntech

    Dear Advait,

    We appreciate your highly detailed and valuable feedback! We have acknowledged your query regarding the touch sensor placement and case weight. We will surely pass this suggestion to our development team to try working on it for future product iterations.

    Best Regards,
    Vyntech
